chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Misc. Application No.S-235 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on M.A.No. 3289/2025 (E/A). 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 18.08.2025 M/s. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani and Hayat Muhammad Khan, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------ Mr. Atta Hussain Chandio, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.2, taken on record. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that subsequent to the passing of the impugned order, the learned trial Court has framed charge; therefore, for a proper conclusion, he intends to move an application under Section 249-A, Cr.P.C. before the trial Court to agitate this as well as other available grounds. Accordingly, he does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Learned counsel for respondent No.2 as well as Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh have raised no objection. In view of the above, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the learned trial Court shall decide the application of the applicant, if filed, strictly in accordance with law within a period of two months. Judge Manzoor
